case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. JUAN A. DOMINGUEZ GARCIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $658.84 FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ GARCIA, JUAN A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($45.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED JUL-06-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ GARCIA, JUAN A.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-16-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ GARCIA, JUAN A. $658.84 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $733.84, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ GARCIA, JUAN A.
